archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury / Theatrical) adapted for Warm Retro

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped layouts.

grids.marketing_hero: Bento Mode A (Tetris Grid) - Asymmetrical, overlapping layers, dramatic scale.

ticket_card.special_effect: Add a dashed dividing line internally (border-l-2 border-dashed border-[#1A1A1A]/30) to simulate a tear-off ticket stub.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp and tactile. Elements should feel physical. Offset shadows increase on hover to lift elements up.
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Staggered fade-up for event lists. Fast, punchy easing (e.g., cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1)).

shadcn_customizations.Input: bg-[#FDFBF7] border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] rounded-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-[#7A1022] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_transparent] focus-visible:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#7A1022]
shadcn_customizations.Card: Use custom Ticket Card surface strategy instead of default Shadcn Card for events.

icons.style: Use robust stroke-width (2 or 2.5) to match the bold retro typography. Primary icons: Mic, MapPin, Calendar, Clock, Ticket, Users.

hero_background.description: Dramatic microphone on stage with smoke. Use as hero background with oxblood overlay (bg-[#7A1022]/80) to allow text readability.

featured_event_1.description: Microphone in front of a theater curtain. Excellent for a premium 'Featured Event' card.

featured_event_2.description: Dark room neon microphone, great for Open Mic or underground events.

audience_reaction.description: Audience laughing. Use in community/signup section to build social proof.

instructions_to_main_agent: Tailwind Config: Add colors (oxblood, marigold, warm-cream) and font families (heading: Abril Fatface, sub: Playfair Display, body: IBM Plex Sans, mono: IBM Plex Mono).

Hero Section: Build an overlapping layout. Left side bold typography ('Find Your Funny'), right side a floating 'Ticket Stub' featuring the nearest upcoming event. Background should be warm-cream with a subtle 'spotlight' radial gradient behind the text.

Event Cards MUST look like retro ticket stubs. Use strict geometric borders (2px solid black), solid offset shadows (brutalist style), and a vertical dashed line separating the time/date (stub) from the event title (main ticket).
Avoid standard corporate UI. Buttons should be chunky rectangles. Avoid pill-shaped rounded-full buttons unless imitating a marquee bulb.
Data Test IDs: Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="event-signup-button"`, `data-testid="create-event-submit"`).
Forms: Wrap Shadcn inputs in sharp 2px black borders. Give them a subtle offset shadow that intensifies on focus. Keep the playful, tactile feel even in functional dashboards.
No purple gradients. No Inter font. Emphasize oxblood red, cream, and stark black for contrast.
